content: /gsd-t-partition M57 — CI-Parity Verify Gate. Then under Level 3 Full Auto auto-advance through the full chain WITHOUT pausing: partition → plan → execute → integrate → verify → complete-milestone. Milestone is DEFINED in .gsd-t/progress.md (M57 row has full scope: D1 build-coverage-check = bin/gsd-t-build-coverage.cjs::checkBuildCoverage; D2 ci-command-parity = bin/gsd-t-ci-parity.cjs; both wired into commands/gsd-t-verify.md as FAIL-blocking checks; CLAUDE-global.md Pre-Commit Gate updated; pair-flag backlog #25). User decisions LOCKED — do NOT re-ask: CI detection = auto-detect from project files (cloudbuild.yaml → .github/workflows/*.yml → Dockerfile RUN → package.json scripts fallback); docker build = auto-run when Dockerfile present, no opt-in flag. 2 file-disjoint domains, parallel wave D1∥D2. Test baseline 2547/2547. Run QA + Red Team + doc-ripple per CLAUDE.md mandatory gates. complete-milestone does minor version bump 3.26.11 → next (new feature) and tags. Do not stop until COMPLETE or an unrecoverable blocker after 2 fix attempts.
